title: Telekinesis
wikitext:
[[File:347986.jpg|center|560px]]
==Summary==
'''The ability to affect physical objects via thoughts only.'''

==Possible Uses==
*Attack the enemy with from multiple directions, which makes it very hard to counter.
*Deny the target mobility, and fling the target way at high speeds (which will lead to a crash in the absence of flight).
*Affect the internal organs of the target (disrupt the target's biological functionality, or completely destroy the internal organ systems)
*Levitate (or even [[Flight|fly]]).
*Create telekinetic [[Forcefield|barriers]].
*Strengthen the user's body, simulating superhuman physical characteristics.
*Manipulate particles at an atomic level (rare)

==Users==
*[[Cell (Dragon Ball)|Cell]], [[Majin Buu]], [[Piccolo]], [[Frieza]], and various others ([[Dragon Ball]])
*[[Alakazam]], [[Mewtwo]] ([[Pokémon]])
*[[Tetsuo Shima (Manga)|Tetsuo Shima]] ([[Akira (Verse)|Akira]])
*[[Tatsumaki (Tornado of Terror)|Tatsumaki]] and [[Fubuki (Blizzard of Hell)|Fubuki]] ([[One-Punch Man]])
